assignments.name: phone
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const d = String($json.body?.phone || $json.phone || '').replace(/\D/g, ''); if (d.length === 10) return '91' + d; return d; })() }}

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const b = $json.body || $json; const raw = String(b.message || '').trim(); const type = String(b.message_type || b.type || b.media_type || '').toLowerCase(); const mime = String(b.mimetype || b.mime_type || '').toLowerCase(); const isAudio = ['audio', 'ptt', 'voice', 'audiomessage'].includes(type) || (b.hasMedia && /audio|ptt|ogg|opus|mpeg/.test(mime)); if (isAudio && !raw) return '[voice note]'; return raw; })() }}

assignments.name: is_audio
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const b = $json.body || $json; const type = String(b.message_type || b.type || b.media_type || '').toLowerCase(); const mime = String(b.mimetype || b.mime_type || '').toLowerCase(); const msg = String(b.message || '').trim(); return ['audio', 'ptt', 'voice', 'audiomessage'].includes(type) || (b.hasMedia && /audio|ptt|ogg|opus|mpeg/.test(mime)) || msg === '[voice note]'; })() }}
